meaning: n.用指摸弄,抚弄,捻弄,用指弹奏,[音]指法,[总称]指法符号,细绒线
examples: They have to give so much thought and attention to the low-level mechanics of dribbling or fingering the keys or reading the music, that they are unable to give any thought to the thing that matters.
Gary sat fingering his beard, saying nothing.
Around me, all these stodgy, old IBMers are flipping through iPads, tapping on iPhones and fingering BlackBerrys.
He is a Samsung Galaxy spokesman, but no one is fingering the Korean brand as the culprit.
